---
title: "Suyeong Park"
subtitle: "Pharm.D., M.S. | Incoming PhD Student @ UTSW"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/subonge
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/psy97/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:tommy02@snu.ac.kr
---

<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; margin-top: 1rem;">

<a href="CV1.png" data-lightbox="cv" style="display: block; transition: transform 0.2s; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-6px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''">
<img src="CV1.png" style="width: 100%; display: block;" alt="CV Page 1"/>
</a>

<a href="CV2.png" data-lightbox="cv" style="display: block; transition: transform 0.2s; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);" onmouseover="this.style.transform='translateY(-6px)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform=''">
<img src="CV2.png" style="width: 100%; display: block;" alt="CV Page 2"/>
</a>

</div>

<style>
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  div[style*="grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr"] {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }
}
</style>
